title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Naukri.com - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Naukri.com - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Naukri.com in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Naukri.com:
Naukri.com is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com!
